description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push. The workflow should have a BUILD_TYPE environment variable set to MinSizeRel and trigger multiple jobs for building on different platforms and compilers, including Linux with GCC and Clang, Windows with MSVC, MinGW, and BCC32, and macOS with Clang. Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, configure CMake, build the project, and optionally upload artifacts.
